content.text:
<user_query>
Fix ALL mypy strict errors in production Python code at /workspaces/agno for paths: app/, agents/, src/agentos_platform/, src/agno_platform/

Run: cd /workspaces/agno && uv run mypy app agents src/agentos_platform src/agno_platform --config-file pyproject.toml

Known error categories to fix properly (no blanket file ignores):
- unused-ignore: remove stale type: ignore comments
- type-arg: add proper generic params dict[str, X], list[str], etc.
- no-untyped-def/no-untyped-call: add annotations
- attr-defined on agno imports: use `# type: ignore[attr-defined]` on specific import lines OR re-export via typed shim
- unreachable in agents/concierge/streaming.py: refactor isinstance/event handling logic
- redundant-expr in agents/devpod/provisioner.py
- no-any-return in ssh_bootstrap.py

Do NOT modify pyproject.toml. Do NOT add broad module-level mypy overrides. Fix the source files.

When done, run mypy again and confirm 0 errors for production paths. Return summary of files changed.
</user_query>

I'll run mypy on the production paths first, then fix each reported error category in the source files.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && uv run mypy app agents src/agentos_platform src/agno_platform --config-file pyproject.toml 2>&1
input.description: Run mypy on production Python paths

content.text:
Mypy is clean for the production paths (170 files, 0 errors).

## Summary of changes (21 files)

| Area | Files | Fixes |
|------|-------|-------|
| **app/** | `app/main.py` | Return types for `_github_agents`, `_registry_tools`, `_register_registry_functions`, `_registry_mcp_lifespan`; `list[Any]` generics |
| **agents/concierge/** | `workflow_state.py`, `workflow_tools.py`, `agui_handoff.py`, `streaming.py`, `prompt_composer.py` | Removed stale ignore; `dict[str, Any]`; `no-untyped-call` on `CustomEvent`; event-string handling instead of `isinstance(ToolCallStartedEvent)`; separate `RunOutputEvent` import with `attr-defined` ignore; import `load_langfuse_prompt_options` from `langfuse_config` |
| **agents/** | `synapse_agent.py`, `discovery_workflow.py`, `synapse_mock_discovery_demo_workflow.py`, `coder_workflow.py`, `architecture_design_workflow.py`, `project_board_poll_workflow.py` | `dict[str, Any]`; `# type: ignore[attr-defined]` on `StepInput`/`StepOutput`; `sanitize_source_repo` from `flow_cli`; `object` intermediate for team `arun` result |
| **agents/** | `github_agent.py`, `github_repo_explorer_agent.py` | Typed `github_mcp_tools() -> MCPTools` |
| **agents/** | `devpod/provisioner.py`, `provisioner/streaming.py`, `provisioner/tools.py`, `provisioner/prerequisite_scripts.py`, `readiness_checker/runner.py` | Redundant `log_path` check; `method-assign` only ignores; `list[Any]`; `assert result`; public keyword names for `tmux_inject_keys` |
| **agents/devpod/** | `web_terminal_service.py`, `workspace_service.py` | `environment_id` keyword (used in failure summaries) |
| **src/agno_platform/** | `models/presets.py`, `agents/notify/tools.py` | `list[Model]`; explicit `str \| None` for telegram result |
| **src/agentos_platform/** | `devpod/ssh_bootstrap.py` | `DevpodCliRunner` annotations |

**Notable patterns**
- Agno workflow imports: targeted `# type: ignore[attr-defined]` on `StepInput`/`StepOutput` / `RunOutputEvent`
- Concierge streaming: `TeamRunEvent.tool_call_started.value` instead of cross-module `isinstance`
- SSH bootstrap: `DevpodCliRunner` protocol from existing `cli.py`
- Prerequisite helpers: renamed `_tmux_session_name` / `_environment_id` so call sites match and parameters are used

**Verification**
```bash
cd /workspaces/agno && uv run mypy app agents src/agentos_platform src/agno_platform --config-file pyproject.toml
# Success: no issues found in 170 source files
```

[REDACTED]
